org.springframework.data.mongodb.gridfs.GridFsObject

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.gridfs
Support for MongoDB GridFS feature.

    Class
    Description
    class

    GridFSFile based Resource implementation.
    class 
    GridFsUpload<ID>
    Upload descriptor for a GridFS file upload.

    Reactive GridFSFile based Resource implementation.

    Methods in org.springframework.data.mongodb.gridfs with parameters of type GridFsObject
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> T
    GridFsOperations.store(GridFsObject<T, InputStream> upload)
    Stores the given GridFsObject, likely a GridFsUpload, into into a file with given name.
    <T> T
    GridFsTemplate.store(GridFsObject<T, InputStream> upload)
     
    <T> Mono<T>
    ReactiveGridFsOperations.store(GridFsObject<T, Publisher<DataBuffer>> upload)
    Stores the given GridFsObject, likely a GridFsUpload, into into a file with given name.

    ReactiveGridFsTemplate.store(GridFsObject<T, Publisher<DataBuffer>> upload)
